name: Polymarket
fullText: BREAKING: Indiana will be revoking all commercial driver’s licenses (CDLs) held by illegal immigrants at midnight.

name: Polymarket
fullText: JUST IN: Andrew Yang says the number of jobs eliminated by AI will be “many times higher” than the number of jobs it creates.

name: Polymarket
fullText: JUST IN: OpenAI’s internal projections reportedly show the $122,000,000,000.00 they raised today gives them as little as 18 months of operational runway before they need to raise again.
